mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on Print and Payment History page when a plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages, additional pages, progress bars, tooltips, and page count displays.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.

components_found_in_this_batch.what_it_does: Page object for OSS Emulator testing tool that simulates printer enrollment and setup flows without physical hardware. Contains 52 locators for device configuration, authentication, app selection, and enrollment completion.
components_found_in_this_batch.usage_example:
oss_emulator_page = OssEmulatorPage(page)
# Use emulator to enroll printer with specific plan
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This precondition requires enrolling a printer with a 50+ pages plan. The OssEmulatorPage provides the interface to simulate printer enrollment in test environment, which is essential for setting up the test precondition without physical printers.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Serial number input field in Device tab for entering printer serial number during emulator configuration
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: Printer enrollment requires setting a serial number. This locator targets the serial number input field in the OSS Emulator for configuring the test printer.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: SKU input field in Device tab for specifying printer model SKU
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: Printer enrollment requires specifying the printer model SKU. This locator targets the SKU input field for configuring the printer model in the emulator.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Start Flow button that initiates the configured printer setup or enrollment flow
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: After configuring printer details, this button starts the enrollment flow to complete the printer enrollment precondition.

precondition_mapping.notes: Found OSS Emulator page object with locators for printer enrollment configuration. However, no API helpers or direct enrollment methods found in this batch. The actual enrollment completion and plan selection (50+ pages) would require additional components from other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Free months message displaying promotional free trial period information
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This precondition requires verifying no free months exist. This locator targets the free months message element that would display if free months were present. Can be used to assert the element is not visible.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Free months promotional message on Print History page
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This locator on the Print History page can also be used to verify no free months message is displayed, fulfilling the precondition check.

precondition_mapping.notes: Found free_months locators on both OverviewPage and PrintHistoryPage that can be used to verify the absence of free months information.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Subscription ID text displayed in plan details column
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: Can be used to verify subscription exists and is active by checking subscription ID is displayed.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Plan information section showing current subscription plan name and page allowance
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: Can be used to verify subscription is active by checking plan information is displayed with valid plan details.

precondition_mapping.notes: Found locators to verify subscription exists and plan information is displayed, but no direct status verification method or API helper to check subscription status is 'subscribed'. Full verification would require API components from other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Pause Plan link that opens the pause plan modal
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This is the exact link mentioned in the precondition to trigger plan pause. Clicking this link opens the pause plan modal.
The modal that appears after clicking the pause plan link, where pause duration is selected.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Dropdown to select number of months to pause subscription
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: Used to select pause duration in the pause plan modal.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Confirm button to finalize pausing the subscription
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: The button to confirm and execute the plan pause action, completing this precondition.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Banner displayed when plan is paused showing pause status
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: Can be used to verify the plan pause action was successful by checking this banner appears.

precondition_mapping.notes: Found complete set of locators for the pause plan flow including the link to open modal, the modal itself, dropdown for duration selection, confirm button, and verification banner. This fully covers the precondition requirement.

matched_page_objects.class_purpose: Page object for Print History page showing billing cycle information, page usage breakdown, invoice downloads, and FAQ. This is the PRIMARY page for this test case.
matched_page_objects.relevance_reason: This is the main page where the test case executes. The test case is specifically about verifying the Billing Cycle Period card on the Print and Payment History page. Steps 1 and 4 navigate to this page, and steps 2-14 perform verifications on elements within this page.

matched_page_objects.class_purpose: Main Overview/Dashboard page with extensive subscription management features including pause plan functionality and navigation to other pages
matched_page_objects.relevance_reason: Relevant for precondition setup (checking free months, subscription status, pausing plan) and for navigation to Print History page. Contains pause plan functionality needed for precondition 3.

matched_page_objects.class_purpose: OSS Emulator interface for simulating printer enrollment and setup flows in test environment
matched_page_objects.relevance_reason: Relevant for precondition 0 - enrolling printer with 50+ pages plan. Provides emulator interface to simulate printer enrollment without physical hardware.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Main print history card container displaying billing cycle information and page usage details
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Steps 2 and 5 require checking the Billing Cycle Period card. This locator targets the main print history card which is the Billing Cycle Period card mentioned in the test case.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Progress bar showing plan pages used out of monthly allowance
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 6 verifies complimentary pages progress bar. Step 10 verifies progress bar is filled with black color after printing. Step 14 verifies progress bar is full. This locator targets the plan/complimentary pages progress bar.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Progress bar showing rollover pages used from previous billing cycles
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 11 mentions verifying progress bars for complimentary and additional pages are displayed. Rollover pages bar may also be relevant for complete page usage display.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Text values within plan pages progress bar showing page counts
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 8 verifies complimentary pages value displays '0 of 10(Pause Plan) used'. Step 10 verifies value after printing. Step 14 verifies '10 of 10 used'. This locator targets the text values within the progress bar.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Text displaying additional pages count and details
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 12 verifies additional pages value displays '5 of 10 used'. Step 14 checks additional pages message. This locator targets the additional pages text display.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Message text about additional pages purchased or used beyond plan allowance
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 14 requires checking message below Additional pages about blocks bought. This locator targets that message text.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Total pages printed count display for selected billing cycle
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 14 requires verifying total pages printed displays correct number (15 pages). This locator targets the total pages printed display.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Billing cycle selector button within print history chart
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Steps 1 and 4 navigate to Print History page. May need to select current billing cycle to view the correct data.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Pause Plan link that opens pause plan modal
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Used in precondition 3 to pause the plan before test execution.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Confirm button to finalize pausing subscription
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Used in precondition 3 to confirm plan pause action.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Banner displayed when plan is paused
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Can verify plan pause was successful by checking this banner appears after precondition 3.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Waits for page title element to be present with configurable timeout. Returns element locator once page loads.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Steps 1 and 4 navigate to Print History page. This method can be used to wait for page load completion before proceeding with verifications.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Property that returns Playwright Locator for FAQ update plan link element
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Not directly used in this test case but available for navigation if needed.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Property that returns Playwright Locator for plan price description text element
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Could be used to verify plan information but not explicitly required by test steps.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Print and Payment History page is loaded

verification_locators.name: page_title
verification_locators.relevance: Verify page title to confirm navigation

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Found page object and page title locator. No specific navigation method found in this batch - navigation would be done via URL or menu click from other pages.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No URL constants found in this batch. URL would need to come from configuration or other batches.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is not displayed.

verification_locators.name: print_history_card
verification_locators.relevance: Target card to check for pause information

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Found the main card locator but no specific locator for plan pause information element within the card. Would need to check if pause info text is visible within the card.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Even shift 32 days and trigger billing charge.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Time shift and billing charge successful

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: This is an API/backend operation. No UI components found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No constants for days to shift found.

step_level_mapping.notes: This step requires API helpers for time manipulation and billing charge trigger. These components are not in this batch which contains only UI page objects.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Page loads with updated data after billing charge

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Same as step 1 - re-navigation to refresh data.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is displayed well.

verification_locators.relevance: Target card to verify pause info displayed

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Found progress bar locator. Can verify visibility and styling.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.

step_level_mapping.notes: No locators found for info icon or tooltip elements in this batch. These UI elements may not have data-testid attributes or may be in different page objects.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the value is displayed as "0 of 10(Pause Plan) used".

verification_locators.relevance: Text values within progress bar showing page counts

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Found text locator for plan pages values. Can extract and verify text matches expected format.

step_level_mapping.notes: No locator found for the informational message below complimentary pages. May need to use generic text locator or parent container.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Print some pages(less than the plan, such as 6 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is filled with the black color and the value is displayed as correct (such as "6 of 10 used").

verification_locators.name: plan_pages_bar
verification_locators.relevance: Progress bar to verify color and fill

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Found progress bar and text locators for verification. Printing action requires API helper not in this batch.

step_level_mapping.notes: Verification components found but printing action requires API helper from other batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Continue to print some pages(more than the plan, such as 15 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the progress bars for "Complimentary pages" and "Additional pages" are displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Found complimentary pages progress bar but no specific additional pages progress bar locator in this batch.

step_level_mapping.notes: Printing action requires API. Additional pages progress bar locator not found - may use different selector.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the icon. For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the info icon is displayed well behind the string "Additional pages". Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No info icon or tooltip locators found for additional pages section.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the message below "Additional pages". Check the Complimentary pages progress bar. Check total pages printed info.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify a message with the amount of blocks already bought is displayed well. Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is full filled with the black color and the value is displayed correctly (such as "10 of 10 used"). Verify correct number(such as 15 pages) displayed according to the printed pages.

verification_locators.name: plan_pages_bar
verification_locators.relevance: Progress bar to verify full fill

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Found all three verification targets: additional pages message, complimentary progress bar, and total pages printed.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Verify the test case is complete.
